thesis: You shaped every output with examples, format, tone, audience. Craft over correction, from the first message.

phaseInsights.0: You led with description from the first message. Examples, format, tone, audience — all four behaviors firing where most users skip three of them.
phaseInsights.1: The artifact effect rewarded you. Polished outputs deepened your craft instinct rather than dulling it. Description discipline stayed high through every session.
